name: new_render_pass
description: Create and integrate a new compute render pass into the deferred pipeline

steps.name: inspect_pipeline
steps.description: Understand current pipeline order and where the new pass should be inserted

steps.name: design
steps.description: Design the pass: decide inputs (depth, normals, HDR), outputs, algorithm, and execution order

steps.name: generate_code
steps.description: Generate C++ header, source, and GLSL shader from templates

steps.name: validate_shader
steps.description: Compile the generated GLSL and check for errors

steps.name: generate_integration
steps.description: Get the exact code patches for deferred_renderer.hpp/.cpp

steps.name: apply_patches
steps.description: Apply the integration patches to wire the new pass into the pipeline

steps.name: build
steps.description: Build the C++ engine with the new pass

steps.name: visual_verify
steps.description: Run the engine and capture a screenshot to verify the pass works

steps.name: log_result
steps.description: Log the experiment outcome in persistent memory
